english: A rugged hand cart with storage space. This prototype uses slow bicycle-style vehicle behavior.
Wooden handles shaped for pushing and steering a wheelbarrow.
A simple pipe frame used to support a wheelbarrow hull.
A metal tray body for carrying supplies in a wheelbarrow.
Pushing the wheelbarrow slows your movement by at least 5%. Filled storage slots past five increase the slowdown by 1% each.
The loaded wheelbarrow is slowing you down.
